description.en: Two-way standmount of the Reserve line — 1" Pinnacle ring-radiator tweeter paired with a 6.5" Turbine-cone mid-bass in a rear-X-Port cabinet. Named 'Bookshelf Loudspeaker of the Year' by The Absolute Sound; cross-braced cabinet designed in Baltimore.
description.es: Bookshelf de dos vías de la línea Reserve — tweeter Pinnacle de anillo radiante de 1" junto a un mid-bass Turbine Cone de 6,5" en gabinete con X-Port trasero. Nombrado 'Bookshelf del Año' por The Absolute Sound; gabinete con refuerzo cruzado diseñado en Baltimore.
